title: Knight's Armory
description: Adds a bunch of medieval-themed armor sets. Iron, Gold, Diamond and Netherite armor variants.
body:
![Knight's Armory Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e8d0adff986b166a776e9c58c88df33f958f104.png)

**Knight's Armory** is a mod which adds a bunch of new medieval-themed armor set. The mod aims to be a more simplified and vanilla-frienly version of the Epic Knighs Mod.

![Dark knight stands in your way](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2736d782516e8a5eeb4a29bcaeba28d615f4a77.jpeg)

![Crossbowman on a watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9a8940b77469570c0666050eae80bba634d89d4.jpeg)

![Golden frog knight in the forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/360bc4ad5cf79e8dae98130140c997fd01660ba1.jpeg)

![Knights standing near camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a78014cb43d75f8be56043cfc2acaf2f8f7dd12.jpeg)

Mods used in sreenshots
- [Let's Do] BloomingNature
- Nature's Spirit
- Jaam's Weaponry
- Descendant's Weaponry
- Villager Recruits
- Better Mob Combat (with the fix for Villager Recruits by CkeezeDev)
- RoadWeaver
  


**How to craft new armor sets?**

Use stone cutter with the armor piece you want to customise
![Armor Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa51f0db9783c5b7929dc645cbc97e75a9c283b2.png)

**How to revert back?**

Also use stone cutter

![Revert to vanilla armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d05305f4c99fd9118b87fbbdca40fb926d2781.jpeg)


**Q&A:**

**Fabric, NeoForge, 1.21.1**: Currently not sure. A resourse pack version is far more likely.

**Decorations for armor**: To be added.

**Why do armor set have such weird names**: Fictional faction names + it helps to connect armor pieces together. (You can still mix and match armor pieces however you like)

**Can I use this mod for my modpack**: YES!
